hero.badge: Long Beach (Platja Llarga), Tarragona - Costa Dorada
hero.headline:
Learn to sail.
Live the Mediterranean.
hero.subheadline: Watersports school in Tarragona. Windsurfing, Kitesurfing, Catamaran and water activities for all levels. Certified FVE/RFEV instructors.

school.title: Learn from the best
school.subtitle: Certified FVE/RFEV instructors with state-of-the-art equipment at Long Beach, Tarragona

activities.title: Discover the coast from the sea

kayak.title: Kayaking
kayak.desc: Explore the coves of Costa Dorada at your own pace. Single or double, for all levels.

banana.title: Banana Boat
banana.desc: The classic fun ride. Suitable for the whole family. Minimum age: 5 years.

donut.title: Donut Ride
donut.desc: Excitement and speed towed by boat. Unlimited adrenaline.

boat.title: Boat Trips
boat.desc: Discover Tarragona and its coastline from the sea. Sunsets included.

ski.title: Ski-bus
ski.desc: Water skiing for beginners and advanced with onboard instructor.

schools.title: Schools
schools.desc: Educational water activities adapted to each age. Special rates for school groups.

companies.title: Companies - Team Building
companies.desc: Strengthen your team with the challenge of the sea. Customized activities for businesses.

friends.title: Friend groups
friends.desc: The perfect water adventure. We combine custom activities for an unforgettable day.

bachelorette.title: Bachelor/ette parties
bachelorette.desc: A different, healthy and exciting celebration. Complete organization included.
